author: Torah Light Editorial Team

header_image_prompt: A serene dawn scene showing a Jewish man wrapped in a white tallit (prayer shawl) standing by a window, eyes closed in prayer as golden sunlight streams through. Hebrew letters of the Shema float gently in the light around him. The room contains traditional Jewish books and a mezuzah on the doorpost, with subtle Chinese elements like bamboo visible outside the window, symbolizing the integration of Jewish practice in an Asian setting.
